issue: i am in US Virgin Islands and the merchant is saying i have to spend minimum 10$ on my VISA card, why so?
subject: Visa card minimum spend
response: Hello! In the US Virgin Islands, merchants are allowed to set a minimum transaction amount of $10 for credit card purchases. This is an exception that applies specifically to credit cards in that region. If you encounter any issues with a merchant refusing to accept your Visa card based on this minimum requirement, please notify your Visa card issuer for assistance. If you have further concerns, feel free to reach out.
justification: Routed to visa as a faq request.
